title: 151 Classic Masking Tape 20 Metres X 48mm
features: READY TO USE: 151 Masking Tape, a classic beige colour tape, easy to tear by hand, removes easily without leaving any sticky residue behind. It's ideal for indoor use, providing adhesion for applications on wood, metal and plastic. Tape roll is 48mm x 20 metres.
DIY INDOOR PAINTING: 151 Masking Tape gives sharp edges to paintwork, apply to ensure straight paint lines are achieved every time.
HOW TO USE: Warning: Always test tape before use on an inconspicuous area. Always apply to clean, dry areas. For best results remove before paint is fully dry.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use 151 Masking Tape roll, 48mm x 20 metres. Store at room temperature
description: 151 Masking Tape, a classic beige colour tape, easy to tear by hand, removes easily without leaving any sticky residue behind. It's ideal for indoor use, providing adhesion for applications on wood, metal and plastic. 151 Masking Tape gives sharp edges to paintwork, apply to ensure straight paint lines are achieved every time. Warning: Always test tape before use on an inconspicuous area. Always apply to clean, dry areas. For best results remove before paint is fully dry. Ready to use roll is 48mm x 20 metres. Store at room temperature.
